executives.name: Bill McDermott
executives.background: Bill McDermott has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since November 2019. From 2010 to 2019, Mr. McDermott served as CEO of SAP SE. He joined SAP in 2002 and held various leadership positions before becoming CEO.

executives.name: Gina Mastantuono
executives.background: Gina Mastantuono has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2020. Prior to joining ServiceNow, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Ingram Micro Inc. from 2016 to 2019.

executives.name: Chirantan "CJ" Desai
executives.background: Chirantan "CJ" Desai has served as our President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Chief Product and Engineering Officer from 2016 to 2023.

executives.name: Paul Smith
executives.background: Paul Smith has served as our Chief Commercial Officer since January 2023. He joined ServiceNow in 2020 as President, EMEA.

executives.name: Jacqui Canney
executives.background: Jacqui Canney has served as our Chief People Officer since July 2021. Prior to joining ServiceNow, she was the Chief People Officer at WPP plc.

board_of_directors.name: Bill McDermott
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of ServiceNow.

board_of_directors.name: Susan L. Bostrom
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President, Chief Marketing Officer, and Worldwide Government Affairs at Cisco Systems, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Teresa Briggs
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice Chair and West Region Managing Partner of Deloitte LLP.

board_of_directors.name: John J. Donahoe
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Nike, Inc. Former CEO of ServiceNow.

board_of_directors.name: Jonathan C. Klein
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and former CEO of Getty Images, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey A. Miller
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of JAMM Ventures.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph "Joe" Lonsdale
board_of_directors.background: Managing Partner at 8VC and co-founder of Palantir Technologies.

board_of_directors.name: Anita M. Sands
board_of_directors.background: Former Group Managing Director and Head of Change Leadership at UBS Financial Services.

sources.source_description: ServiceNow, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
